title: Shade & Saturation Slider
description: Adds a shade and saturation slider for visual tweeks
body:
Adds a shade and saturation slider allowing you to change the block shade percentage as well as adding a saturation slider so you can change the games saturation

The slider is located in sodium video settings, under the quality tab

By default it has a 1x saturation multiplier and 75% shade

-Icon by Stridey

(feel free to use in any modpacks)
